title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 89.250 - Expedited eligibility process, pregnant women
text:
208.181.  Expedited eligibility process, pregnant women. — This law shall not limit or abridge any power now or hereafter conferred by law on such cities to establish building lines or take any property or any interest therein by eminent domain.
(RSMo 1939 § 7751) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7603
